message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
## Task: flt-it8.32.8 — TDD Guard Go integration

**Issue**: Wire go test JSON output through tdd-guard-go and provide a stable make target for API TDD workflows.

**Deliverables**:
- `make api-test-tdd` — stable make target (already exists in root and api/Makefile)
- Documented `tdd-guard-go` install path

**Current state**:
The api/Makefile already has this target:
```makefile
## test-tdd: Run Go tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
test-tdd:
	if command -v tdd-guard-go >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
		go test -json ./... 2>&1 | tdd-guard-go -project-root "$$(pwd)"; \
	else \
		go test -json ./...; \
	fi
```

The root Makefile delegates: `api-test-tdd: $(MAKE) -C api test-tdd`

**What to verify and complete**:
1. Test that `make api-test-tdd` works from the project root (with tdd-guard-go not installed — should fall back gracefully)
2. Verify the Go JSON test output format is correct for tdd-guard-go consumption
3. Add documentation about how to install tdd-guard-go (in CLAUDE.md or a docs file)
4. Ensure the -race flag is included or document why it's omitted (tdd-guard-go compatibility)
5. Add any missing integration — check if tdd-guard-go has specific flags or config needed

**Quality gate**: `make api-test-unit && make api-lint` (Go only changes)

**Important**: Follow CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md conventions. Mark `bd update flt-it8.32.8 --status in_progress` before starting work.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/tdd-go"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on
your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

</teammate-message>

file.content:
## Flotsam API Makefile
## ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Usage: make <target>
## Targets requiring DATABASE_URL: migrate-up, migrate-down, migrate-status, migrate-create

MODULE      := github.com/ketang/flotsam/api
VERSION     := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev)
BUILD_TIME  := $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
LDFLAGS     := -ldflags "-X $(MODULE)/internal/version.Version=$(VERSION) \
                          -X $(MODULE)/internal/version.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)"

GOLANGCI_LINT := $(shell which golangci-lint 2>/dev/null || echo $(shell go env GOPATH)/bin/golangci-lint)

GOOSE_DRIVER  := postgres
GOOSE_DBSTRING ?= $(DATABASE_URL)
GOOSE_DIR     := migrations

.PHONY: build run generate lint vet fmt tidy clean \
        migrate-up migrate-down migrate-status migrate-create \
        test test-unit test-tdd test-integration seed dev help

## build: Compile all binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
build:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam

## build-server: Compile flotsamd only
build-server:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd

## build-worker: Compile flotsam-worker only
build-worker:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker

## build-cli: Compile flotsam CLI only
build-cli:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam

## run: Run the API server directly (no build step)
run:
	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsamd

## run-worker: Run the job worker directly (continuous mode)
run-worker:
	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsam-worker --watch

## generate: Re-run gqlgen code generation
generate:
	go generate ./...

## lint: Run go vet + golangci-lint (includes gosec security checks)
lint:
	go vet ./...
	$(GOLANGCI_LINT) run ./...

## vet: Run go vet
vet:
	go vet ./...

## fmt: Format all Go source files
fmt:
	gofmt -w .

## tidy: Tidy go.mod and go.sum
tidy:
	go mod tidy

## clean: Remove build artifacts
clean:
	rm -rf bin/

## migrate-up: Apply all pending database migrations
migrate-up:
	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" up

## migrate-down: Roll back the most recent migration
migrate-down:
	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" down

## migrate-status: Show migration status
migrate-status:
	go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" status

## migrate-create NAME=<name>: Create a new migration file
migrate-create:
	go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" create $(NAME) sql

## test: Run all tests with race detector
test:
	go test -race ./...

## test-unit: Run unit tests only (short mode)
test-unit:
	go test -race -short ./...

## test-tdd: Run Go tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
test-tdd:
	if command -v tdd-guard-go >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
		go test -json ./... 2>&1 | tdd-guard-go -project-root "$$(pwd)"; \
	else \
		go test -json ./...; \
	fi

## test-integration: Run integration tests (requires DATABASE_URL)
test-integration:
	go test -race -run Integration ./...

## dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing (requires ENV=development)
dev-token:
	go run ./cmd/devtoken

## seed: Populate database with sample data
seed:
	go run ./cmd/seed

## dev: Run with air hot-reload (requires: go install github.com/air-verse/air@latest)
dev:
	air

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@grep -E '^## ' Makefile | sed 's/## //' | column -t -s ':'

file.content:
## Flotsam Monorepo Makefile — delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present — makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit api-test-tdd \
        api-lint api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-tdd web-schema-sync \
        lint \
        dev dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        test-quick test-standard test-full \
        help

## api-build: Build all API binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## api-run: Run the API server (flotsamd)
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-run-worker: Run the job worker (flotsam-worker --watch)
api-run-worker:
	$(MAKE) -C api run-worker

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-test-tdd: Run API tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
api-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-seed: Populate dev database with sample data
api-seed:
	$(MAKE) -C api seed

## api-dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing
api-dev-token:
	$(MAKE) -C api dev-token

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql → :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-tdd: Run web tests with TDD Guard reporter when configured
web-test-tdd:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-tdd

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/*.graphql > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (Docker PG + air + Vite) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PG 16 + pgvector + MinIO on port 5433)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/flotsam?sslmode=disable"
	@echo ""
	@echo "MinIO console: http://localhost:9001 (minioadmin/minioadmin)"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## test-quick: Fast checks — Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick: api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation — quick + web unit tests + Go lint (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard: test-quick web-test api-lint

## test-full: Complete validation — standard + integration tests (requires DB + running services)
test-full: test-standard api-test

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@echo ""
	@echo "Usage: make <target>"
	@echo ""
	@grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
		done

content.content: exit: 1

content.text: Now let me check tdd-guard-go details and the AGENTS.md for conventions.

# Shatter

Automatic exploratory testing via concolic execution. Shatter analyzes your functions, discovers branches, and generates inputs that exercise every code path — no test authoring required.

## Installation

Shatter is not yet published to a package registry or public repository. Build from source:

```bash
cd shatter
cargo build --release
# Binary is at target/release/shatter
```

## Quickstart

```bash
# 1. Install shatter (see above)

# 2. Write a function
cat > shipping.ts <<'EOF'
export function calculateShipping(weight: number, country: string): number {
  if (weight <= 0) throw new Error("Invalid weight");
  if (country === "US") return weight < 5 ? 5.99 : 12.99;
  return weight < 5 ? 15.99 : 29.99;
}
EOF

# 3. Explore it
shatter explore shipping.ts:calculateShipping

# 3. Explore it

# Shatter Holdout Test Suite

A hidden, repeatable testing suite for the [shatter](../shatter) concolic execution engine. Runs shatter against a curated set of open-source utility libraries, evaluates performance, and produces sanitized improvement issues that don't reveal the testing methodology or library identities.

## Quick Start

```bash
./run.sh
```

This builds shatter, clones all targets, runs scans, computes metrics, and generates an LLM-powered evaluation with sanitized issues.

## Targets

| Name | Language | Repo |
|------|----------|------|
| es-toolkit | TypeScript | toss/es-toolkit |
| remeda | TypeScript | remeda/remeda |
| change-case | TypeScript | blakeembrey/change-case |
| ts-pattern | TypeScript | gvergnaud/ts-pattern |

# flt-it8.32.8: TDD Guard Go Integration

## Context
The `make api-test-tdd` target already exists in both root and api Makefiles with graceful fallback when `tdd-guard-go` is not installed. This task verifies it works correctly and adds documentation for the install path.

## Current State
- `api/Makefile` has `test-tdd` target that checks for `tdd-guard-go` via `command -v`, falls back to plain `go test -json`
- Root `Makefile` delegates via `$(MAKE) -C api test-tdd`
- `tdd-guard-go` is not currently installed on this system and appears to be a private tool
- CLAUDE.md already references `make api-test-tdd` in the commands table

## Changes

### 1. Verify fallback works
- Run `make api-test-tdd` from project root — confirm it falls back to `go test -json` cleanly

### 2. Add `-short` flag to test-tdd target
- The current target runs `go test -json ./...` (all tests including integration) — should use `-short` for TDD workflows since they run frequently and shouldn't require a DB
- Update: `go test -json -short ./...` in both the tdd-guard-go and fallback paths

### 3. Document `-race` omission
- `-race` is intentionally omitted from the TDD target for speed — TDD loops need fast feedback
- Add a comment in `api/Makefile` explaining this

### 4. Add install documentation
- Add a `docs/ci/tdd-guard.md` file documenting:
  - What tdd-guard-go does (formats Go test JSON output for TDD workflows)
  - Install path: `go install <module>@latest` (need to confirm actual module path with user)
  - Usage via `make api-test-tdd`

## Files to modify
- `api/Makefile` — add `-short` flag, add comment about `-race` omission
- `docs/ci/tdd-guard.md` — new file with install/usage docs

## Verification
- `make api-test-tdd` from project root — must exit 0 with JSON output
- `make api-test-unit && make api-lint` — quality gate

toolUseResult.originalFile:
## Flotsam API Makefile
## ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Usage: make <target>
## Targets requiring DATABASE_URL: migrate-up, migrate-down, migrate-status, migrate-create

MODULE      := github.com/ketang/flotsam/api
VERSION     := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev)
BUILD_TIME  := $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
LDFLAGS     := -ldflags "-X $(MODULE)/internal/version.Version=$(VERSION) \
                          -X $(MODULE)/internal/version.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)"

GOLANGCI_LINT := $(shell which golangci-lint 2>/dev/null || echo $(shell go env GOPATH)/bin/golangci-lint)

GOOSE_DRIVER  := postgres
GOOSE_DBSTRING ?= $(DATABASE_URL)
GOOSE_DIR     := migrations

.PHONY: build run generate lint vet fmt tidy clean \
        migrate-up migrate-down migrate-status migrate-create \
        test test-unit test-tdd test-integration seed dev help

## build: Compile all binaries (flotsamd, flotsam-worker, flotsam)
build:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam

## build-server: Compile flotsamd only
build-server:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsamd ./cmd/flotsamd

## build-worker: Compile flotsam-worker only
build-worker:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam-worker ./cmd/flotsam-worker

## build-cli: Compile flotsam CLI only
build-cli:
	go build $(LDFLAGS) -o bin/flotsam ./cmd/flotsam

## run: Run the API server directly (no build step)
run:
	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsamd

## run-worker: Run the job worker directly (continuous mode)
run-worker:
	go run $(LDFLAGS) ./cmd/flotsam-worker --watch

## generate: Re-run gqlgen code generation
generate:
	go generate ./...

## lint: Run go vet + golangci-lint (includes gosec security checks)
lint:
	go vet ./...
	$(GOLANGCI_LINT) run ./...

## vet: Run go vet
vet:
	go vet ./...

## fmt: Format all Go source files
fmt:
	gofmt -w .

## tidy: Tidy go.mod and go.sum
tidy:
	go mod tidy

## clean: Remove build artifacts
clean:
	rm -rf bin/

## migrate-up: Apply all pending database migrations
migrate-up:
	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" up

## migrate-down: Roll back the most recent migration
migrate-down:
	DATABASE_URL=$(GOOSE_DBSTRING) go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" down

## migrate-status: Show migration status
migrate-status:
	go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" status

## migrate-create NAME=<name>: Create a new migration file
migrate-create:
	go run github.com/pressly/goose/v3/cmd/goose \
		-dir $(GOOSE_DIR) $(GOOSE_DRIVER) "$(GOOSE_DBSTRING)" create $(NAME) sql

## test: Run all tests with race detector
test:
	go test -race ./...

## test-unit: Run unit tests only (short mode)
test-unit:
	go test -race -short ./...

## test-tdd: Run Go tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
test-tdd:
	if command -v tdd-guard-go >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
		go test -json ./... 2>&1 | tdd-guard-go -project-root "$$(pwd)"; \
	else \
		go test -json ./...; \
	fi

## test-integration: Run integration tests (requires DATABASE_URL)
test-integration:
	go test -race -run Integration ./...

## dev-token: Mint a dev JWT for local testing (requires ENV=development)
dev-token:
	go run ./cmd/devtoken

## seed: Populate database with sample data
seed:
	go run ./cmd/seed

## dev: Run with air hot-reload (requires: go install github.com/air-verse/air@latest)
dev:
	air

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@grep -E '^## ' Makefile | sed 's/## //' | column -t -s ':'

lines: ## test-tdd: Run Go tests with tdd-guard-go when installed
+## Omits -race for faster TDD feedback loops; use test/test-unit for race detection.

input.content:
# TDD Guard

TDD Guard tools format test output for AI-assisted TDD workflows. They parse
native test runner JSON/TAP output and produce structured summaries optimized
for LLM consumption.

## Go — `tdd-guard-go`

### Install

```bash
go install github.com/ketang/tdd-guard-go@latest
```

Ensure `$(go env GOPATH)/bin` is in your `PATH`.

### Usage

```bash
# Via make target (recommended — auto-detects installation)
make api-test-tdd        # from project root
make test-tdd            # from api/

# Manual
go test -json -short ./... 2>&1 | tdd-guard-go -project-root "$(pwd)"
```

The make target gracefully falls back to raw `go test -json` output when
`tdd-guard-go` is not installed.

### Design choices

- **`-short` flag**: TDD loops run frequently, so only unit tests execute.
  Use `make api-test` or `make api-test-unit` for the full suite with race
  detection.
- **No `-race` flag**: Omitted for speed in tight feedback loops. The `test`
  and `test-unit` targets include `-race`.

## Vitest — TDD Guard reporter

See `web/CLAUDE.md` for the Vitest TDD Guard reporter configuration.

## Go — `tdd-guard-go`

### Install

```

Ensure `$(go env GOPATH)/bin` is in your `PATH`.

### Usage

```bash

make api-test-tdd        # from project root
make test-tdd            # from api/

# Manual
go test -json -short ./... 2>&1 | tdd-guard-go -project-root "$(pwd)"
```

The make target gracefully falls back to raw `go test -json` output when
`tdd-guard-go` is not installed.

### Design choices

- **`-short` flag**: TDD loops run frequently, so only unit tests execute.
  Use `make api-test` or `make api-test-unit` for the full suite with race
  detection.
- **No `-race` flag**: Omitted for speed in tight feedback loops. The `test`
  and `test-unit` targets include `-race`.

## Vitest — TDD Guard reporter

See `web/CLAUDE.md` for the Vitest TDD Guard reporter configuration.
